task_prompt: Investigate why average([2,4]) returns 4.0 instead of 3.0 in calcpkg.ops. The report mentions the API and UI auth pages only as context from the ticket template — do not treat those as the problem. Do not edit anything.
ground_truth_root_cause: average divides by len(nums)-1 off-by-one when length > 1
known_traps: P0.2/P0.3 negative controls: incidental API/UI/auth words

scripted.root_cause_statement: average divides by len(nums)-1 off-by-one when length > 1
